# 14 Data Governance and Retention

## Data Categories
- Transactional trading data
- Operational telemetry
- Audit and compliance data
- Reporting exports

## Retention Principles
- Retain transactional and audit data per policy.
- Apply lifecycle management to logs and reports.
- Enforce deletion windows for non-critical derived artifacts.

## Data Quality Controls
- Schema validation at ingestion boundaries.
- Contract compatibility checks in CI.
